Remarks: [TNS Source Group: ASAS-SN; Classifier/s: Daichi Hiramatsu, Ia...] Using Superfit (Howell et al. 2005, ApJ, 634, 1190) and SNID (Blondin & Tonry 2007, ApJ, 666, 1024), we find good fits to several young Type II supernovae around the redshift of the proposed host galaxy (z=0.026665; 6dF DR4, via NED).
